nonAuthorityStatement: Historical bot configuration, historical behavior, green CI, tags, provider approval settings, CODEOWNERS, and private planning artifacts are not release authority.

requiredInputs.releaseStewardApproval: verified Release Steward approval bound to that digest

operations.hybridBoundary: Advisory stages receive no privileged environment or credential. A separately scoped privileged stage may consume only approved immutable inputs after every required gate is verified.
operations.preEffectStopCondition: If any required input, approval, target identity, future control, or immutable candidate input is absent, unknown, stale, or mismatched, stop before the first tag or other effect.
operations.failureBehavior: Record the blocker in this public procedure and produce no effect event or external effect.
operations.fallback: Release Steward retains the visible blocking procedure; no fallback may create, move, or delete a tag.
operations.effectPolicy: No effect is authorized while currentReadiness is blocked.

operations.fallback: Release Steward retains the visible blocking procedure; no fallback may publish a package, release, artifact, or deployment.

blockingPrerequisites: later immutable candidate policy evidence absent
operations.preEffectStopCondition: If RFC, wire, approval, target, control, or immutable evidence is absent or unknown, stop before any protected policy or release effect.
operations.failureBehavior: Record the blocker in this public procedure and produce no effect event or external effect.
operations.fallback: Security Steward retains the visible blocking procedure and routes compatibility concerns through GOVERNANCE.md without asserting release authority.
operations.effectPolicy: No effect is authorized while currentReadiness is blocked.

operations.preEffectStopCondition: If authoritative evidence cannot be produced, stop before any privileged effect and retain the missing evidence as a public blocker.
